name: Deep Book Reversal Signal
hypothesis: When the top of the book (BBO) shows strong directional pressure (high obi_1) but the deeper, more 'patient' liquidity disagrees (negative obi_ex_bbo), the BBO pressure is likely transient and will fail. This divergence is a strong signal for a reversal against the direction indicated by obi_1.
mutation_note: The original spec (iter000) was tested with long_if_pos and had a <10% WR, invalidating it as a momentum signal. This resubmission corrects the direction to long_if_neg to properly test the hypothesis that this setup is a reversal signal, as suggested by microstructure theory.
